summary: Comprehensive testing of venue owner dashboard enhancements (booking detail view + history tab + filters). All features tested and working correctly.

features_tested.stats_bar: PASS - All 5 stats visible: Total (14), Confirmed (8), Pending (6), Cancelled (0), Upcoming (14)
features_tested.booking_filters: PASS - Time filters (All Time/Upcoming/Past), Status dropdown, Sort toggle all functional
features_tested.booking_detail_dialog: PASS - Opens on booking card click, shows: status banner, venue/host info, payment details, split config (when applicable), timestamps, cancel button
features_tested.history_tab: PASS - Shows bookings grouped by date in timeline format with day totals and booking counts
features_tested.history_booking_click: PASS - Clicking history booking opens same detail dialog

notes: Cancel booking button shows 'Only the host can cancel' for venue owner - this is CORRECT behavior per backend logic at /app/backend/routes/bookings.py:278

filter_tests: time-filter-upcoming button present and functional - PASS
time-filter-past button present and functional - PASS
status-filter-select dropdown present and functional - PASS
booking_detail_tests: booking-detail-view opens on card click - PASS
booking-detail-split section present (on split bookings) - PASS
history_tab_tests: Date groups visible (9 groups found) - PASS
History booking rows visible (15 found) - PASS
History booking click opens detail dialog - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Booking detail dialog shows comprehensive information including payment details, timestamps, and split config
Cancel booking restriction to host-only is correct business logic
History tab groups bookings by date with day totals - well designed
seed_data_creation: Used existing bookings from previous test iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue owner dashboard enhancements fully tested and working. Stats bar, filters (time/status/sort), booking detail dialog, and history tab all functional. Note: Cancel booking button is correctly restricted to booking host only - venue owners cannot cancel on behalf of players.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment gateway: MOCKED - Using mock-confirm endpoint instead of real Razorpay
